suite.name: Api-Campsites

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=https://travels.praegus.nl, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: API-01 GET all campsites returns expected website campsite names

kw.name: Get Request
kw.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.Get Request' is deprecated. Please use `GET On Session` instead.

GET Request : url=https://travels.praegus.nl/api/campsites path_url=/api/campsites headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://travels.praegus.nl/api/campsites status=200, reason=OK headers={'Vary': 'Origin, Access-Control-Request-Method, Access-Control-Request-Headers', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'X-XSS-Protection': '0', 'Cache-Control': 'no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate', 'Pragma': 'no-cache', 'Expires': '0', 'Strict-Transport-Security': 'max-age=31536000 ; includeSubDomains', 'X-Frame-Options': 'SAMEORIGIN', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Date': 'Thu, 16 Apr 2026 10:43:22 GMT', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Alt-Svc': 'h3=":443"; ma=2592000', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked'} body=[{"id":1,"name":"Pine Valley Campground","location":"Yosemite National Park, CA","description":"Beautiful campsite nestled among pine trees with stunning views of the valley. Perfect for families and groups.","pricePerNight":45.0,"capacity":6,"amenities":"Fire pit, Picnic table, Water access, Restrooms nearby","imageUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504280390367-361c6d9f38f4","available":true,"campsiteType":"tent","terrainType":"forest","accessibilityLevel":"easy"},{"id":2,"name":"Lakeside Retreat","location":"Lake Tahoe, CA","description":"Peaceful campsite right on the shores of Lake Tahoe. Enjoy swimming, fishing, and beautiful sunsets.","pricePerNight":65.0,"capacity":4,"amenities":"Dock access, Fire ring, Picnic table, Shower facilities","imageUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1537905569824-f89f14cceb68","available":true,"campsiteType":"cabin","terrainType":"lake","accessibilityLevel":"easy"},{"id":3,"name":"Desert Oasis","location":"Joshua Tree National Park, CA","description":"Experience the magic of the desert at this secluded campsite. Amazing stargazing opportunities.","pricePerNight":35.0,"capacity":8,"amenities":"Shade structure, Fire pit, Vault toilets","imageUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523987355523-c7b5b0dd90a7","available":true,"campsiteType":"tent","terrainType":"desert","accessibilityLevel":"moderate"},{"id":4,"name":"Mountain View","location":"Rocky Mountain National Park, CO","description":"High-altitude campsite with breathtaking views of the Rocky Mountains. Great hiking trails nearby.","pricePerNight":55.0,"capacity":5,"amenities":"Bear boxes, Fire ring, Picnic table, Potable water","imageUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1571863533956-01c88e79957e","available":false,"campsiteType":"backcountry","terrainType":"mountain","accessibilityLevel":"difficult"},{"id":5,"name":"Coastal Hideaway","location":"Big Sur, CA","description":"Stunning coastal campsite with ocean views and beach access. Fall asleep to the sound of waves.","pricePerNight":75.0,"capacity":4,"amenities":"Beach access, Fire pit, Picnic table, Hot showers","imageUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1510312305653-8ed496efae75","available":true,"campsiteType":"glamping","terrainType":"beach","accessibilityLevel":"accessible"}]

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.msg: ${CREATED_ID} =
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

test.name: API-03 POST creates a new campsite successfully

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${name} = API Test Campsite 20260416124322
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${payload} = {'name': 'API Test Campsite 20260416124322', 'location': 'Test Valley, TX', 'description': 'Test campsite created by API smoke test.', 'pricePerNight': '42.0', 'capacity': '3', 'amenities': 'BBQ, Wate...
kw.arg: description=Test campsite created by API smoke test.
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Post Request
kw.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.Post Request' is deprecated. Please use `POST On Session` instead.

POST Request : url=https://travels.praegus.nl/api/campsites path_url=/api/campsites headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '370', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "API Test Campsite 20260416124322", "location": "Test Valley, TX", "description": "Test campsite created by API smoke test.", "pricePerNight": "42.0", "capacity": "3", "amenities": "BBQ, Water, Fire pit", "imageUrl": "https://example.com/test-campsite.jpg", "available": "True", "campsiteType": "tent", "terrainType": "forest", "accessibilityLevel": "moderate"}'
